heading: Lower Dyraaba vs Lower Lewis Ponds — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lower Dyraaba, New South Wales and Lower Lewis Ponds, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lower Lewis Ponds has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Lower Dyraaba (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lower Dyraaba or Lower Lewis Ponds safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lower Dyraaba has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Lower Lewis Ponds scores 60/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lower Dyraaba scores 29/100 for bushfire risk. Lower Lewis Ponds scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lower Dyraaba or Lower Lewis Ponds?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lower Lewis Ponds has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.83% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
